# ona_runner_policy (List Resource)

Lists supported Ona runner group-access policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_runner_policy" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `runner_ids` (List of String) Runner IDs whose policies should be listed. When omitted, all importable runners are enumerated.
